svg.text: Sukabumi River Monitoring Station - System Overview
Solar-Powered PoE Camera System | OpenRiverCam Indonesia Spring 2026
VEVOR COMPUTE ENCLOSURE (IP66, 16x12x8in, DIN rail mounting)
1. Stack Order: Pi 5 (bottom) + Pi-EzConnect (top) - on DIN rail clip
2. Apply MG 422C silicone conformal coat to: Pi 5, Pi-EzConnect. Mask connectors/headers
3. DDR-60G-5: Regulated 5V for compute. DDR-60G-12: Regulated 12V for PoE switch (battery voltage varies 10-14V)
4. Relay: GPIO-triggered 4-CH SPDT (Electronics-Salon). GPIO 24=PoE, GPIO 17/27/22=LEDs. Software controls each channel independently
5. Proxicast puck antenna: 12mm hole in enclosure top, rubber gasket seal. Internal SMA pigtails to modem U.FL
6. SHT40 (inside enclosure) monitors climate. DS18B20 probe (outside, PG9 gland) for ambient temp/dew point
7. Pi 5 built-in RTC (ML-2020 coin cell) provides scheduling via Rainbow Sensing image
8. Gore M12 vent for pressure equalization. No heaters (solar power budget). Carrier: Telkomsel
9. External power button wired to Pi 5 J2 header (not GPIO). Press to power on/off; hold 5s to force-off
GPIO 14 UART TX Serial To Hydreon RG-15 RX
GPIO 15 UART RX Serial From Hydreon RG-15 TX
GPIO 17 Green LED Output System OK
GPIO 23 Button Input Maintenance mode (3s hold)
GPIO 24 Relay IN1 Output PoE switch (12V via relay)
LEDs: 12V via relay CH2/3/4 | All DDR-60G: built-in OCP/OVP
